name: Oatmeal Crusty Top Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. For the pastry, mix together oats, flour, and salt. Add lard and stir until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Gradually add cold water, stirring until a dough forms.
2. Shape the dough into a ball and let it rest for 5 minutes. Roll out the dough to fit an 8 or 9-inch pie plate. It is delicate, so be careful when lifting and folding the dough in half. If it tears, simply join the pieces together.
3. To prepare the filling, combine apples, brown sugar, and cinnamon in a bowl.
4. Place the apple mixture into the pie shell.
5. For the topping, mix oats, flour, brown sugar, and cinnamon. Add margarine and stir until the mixture forms crumbs.
6. Spread the crumb topping over the apples.
7. Bake for 35 minutes at 375 degrees F, or until golden brown on top.
